chuyen-doi-so-2026.title: 5 Reasons Small Businesses Need Digital Transformation in 2026
chuyen-doi-so-2026.excerpt: Digital transformation is no longer optional, it's mandatory. Discover the 5 most important reasons.
chuyen-doi-so-2026.author: Nguyen Ngoc Tho
chuyen-doi-so-2026.content:
## Why is digital transformation urgent?

In the rapidly growing digital economy, small businesses cannot stand aside. Here are 5 important reasons:

### 1. Customers have gone digital

Over 70% of Vietnamese consumers shop online. If your business isn't present in the digital environment, you're losing most of your potential customers.

### 2. Reduce operating costs

Automating manual processes can reduce operating costs by up to 40%.

### 3. Increase productivity

Digital tools help employees work more efficiently.

### 4. Data is an asset

When everything is digitized, you have data to make accurate decisions.

### 5. AI is changing the game

AI is no longer far away. At reasonable costs, small businesses can leverage AI.

**VKT Software** is ready to accompany you. Contact us for free consultation!

chi-phi-lam-app.title: Cost of Building a Sales App: What's Reasonable?
chi-phi-lam-app.excerpt: Learn the actual costs of developing a sales app suitable for SMEs in Vietnam.
chi-phi-lam-app.author: Nguyen Ngoc Tho
chi-phi-lam-app.content:
## Cost of building a sales app in Vietnam

One of the most common questions: "How much does it cost to build a sales app?" The answer depends on many factors.

### Factors affecting cost

- Basic app: 15-30M VND
- Medium app: 30-50M VND
- Advanced app: 50-200M VND

Contact VKT Software for detailed consultation and pricing!

ai-cho-doanh-nghiep.title: AI for Small Businesses: No Longer Out of Reach
ai-cho-doanh-nghiep.excerpt: AI is not just for large corporations. Small businesses can fully leverage AI at reasonable costs.
ai-cho-doanh-nghiep.author: Nguyen Ngoc Tho
ai-cho-doanh-nghiep.content:
## AI has never been closer

Many small business owners think AI is only for large corporations. But reality has completely changed.

### Practical AI applications for SMEs

- Customer service chatbot
- Process automation
- Business data analytics
- Smart marketing

VKT Software specializes in AI solutions for SMEs. Contact us for free consultation!
